parameters-en.Speed: Controls the rate of filter movement. Low values result in almost a flanger-type effect while higher values can generate spaceship noises, especially with a high Q.
parameters-en.Depth: Shifts the frequency range of the filters up and down. Lower values produce low warbles and higher values produce high warbles.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency band affected by the filters.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no modulation is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
